0._value: Having reached level 30 and mastered the way of the Rogue, I feel the urge to learn even more.

1._value: Perhaps #b#p411##k of #b#m10003000##k could teach me greater lessons.

2._value: #b#p411##k said that if I can pass the test he gives, he’ll gladly teach me more. I’m no longer the weakling I once was, but hearing that I still have to face a trial makes me a bit nervous.

0._value: Finally, I’ve reached level 30! It hasn’t been easy, but now I’m confident I can stand as a true Rogue who won’t lose to anyone. Still… is this really enough? The world is vast, and I find myself wanting to learn more.

1._value: I should probably visit #b#p411##k in #b#m10003000##k again. He might be able to teach me things I’ve never known.

0._value: Hmmm... you seem to have gotten a whole lot stronger. You got rid of the old, weak self and look much more like a thief now.

1._value: No need for a long explanation. You want to know more about the deeper, darker world, don’t you? Seeing someone like you makes me feel fired up for the first time in a while… heh.
